responseMessageContents.text:
The Cloudflare API token appears to be invalid or expired — the authentication failed with error code 10001 ("Unable to authenticate request").

**What happened:**
- The worker code is ready and correct at `worker/src/index.ts` with all 5 endpoints
- Deployment was attempted using `wrangler deploy`
- Cloudflare rejected the token with an authentication error

**What you need to do:**
1. Generate a new Cloudflare API token at: https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens
2. Make sure the token has **"Edit Cloudflare Workers"** permission
3. Share the new token and I'll redeploy immediately

The worker code itself is fully ready with all endpoints:
- `GET /health`
- `POST /api/send-email-otp`
- `POST /api/verify-email-otp`
- `POST /api/create-payment`
- `POST /api/verify-payment`
